cause: TLS session crash (undici bug)
description: Node.js undici TLS session resumption crash. Known bug in openclaw 2026.3.x. Gateway will restart.

cause: Mutex lock failure (多实例冲突)
description: Multiple gateway instances competing for the same resources. Caused by rapid restart loop.

cause: Telegram deleteWebhook 死循环 (IPv6 连接失败)
description: Telegram API unreachable via IPv6. Ensure NODE_OPTIONS=--dns-result-order=ipv4first is set in LaunchAgent.

cause: 端口 18789 被占用
description: Another process is holding port 18789. Old gateway instance was not fully stopped.

match: Unrecognized key|unrecognized configuration key|Invalid config at.*openclaw\.json
cause: 配置文件无效字段
description: openclaw.json contains an unrecognized key (e.g. agents.defaults.model.fallback). Run: openclaw doctor --fix  or  openclaw config validate

match: context window too small|contextWindow.*16000|contextWindow.*too small|low context window|blocked model.*context window
cause: 模型 contextWindow 配置过小
description: Model contextWindow is below the required minimum (16000). Agent execution will be blocked. Run: openclaw doctor --fix  or set a model with larger context via: openclaw models set <model>

cause: Telegram Bot Token 无效或过期
description: Bot token rejected by Telegram API (401 Unauthorized or 404 Not Found). Get a new token from @BotFather.

cause: Gateway 关闭超时
description: Gateway did not shut down cleanly within the timeout window.

match: JavaScript heap out of memory|ENOMEM|Allocation failed
cause: 内存不足 (OOM)
description: Node.js ran out of heap memory. Consider increasing --max-old-space-size.

cause: 连接被重置
description: Connection reset, likely a transient network issue.

cause: Telegram API 触发频率限制 (429)
description: Bot is sending too many requests. Telegram enforces per-bot rate limits. Gateway will auto-retry after the specified delay.

match: OAuth token refresh failed for|Failed to refresh OAuth token|Please try again or re-authenticate
cause: OAuth 凭证过期，需要重新授权
description: OAuth token for a model provider (e.g. openai-codex) has expired. Run: openclaw models auth login --provider <provider>

match: All models failed \(\d+\)|Embedded agent failed before reply.*All models failed
cause: 所有模型提供商均失败
description: Complete model failover — all configured LLM providers returned errors. Check OAuth tokens and network connectivity.

cause: LLM 请求超时
description: Model API did not respond within the timeout window. May be transient overload on the provider side.

cause: Telegram 服务器返回 502 Bad Gateway
description: Telegram API server is temporarily overloaded or down. This is on Telegram's side — gateway will retry automatically.

match: Network request for '.*' failed!|telegram.*network.*failed|message failed: Network request
cause: Telegram API 网络请求失败
description: Gateway cannot reach api.telegram.org. May be a transient network issue or DNS failure.

cause: 模型 API 返回 403 Forbidden
description: Model provider rejected the request with 403. Check API key permissions or account status for the provider.

cause: 内嵌 Agent 在回复前崩溃
description: An embedded agent failed before generating a reply. Check model provider status, OAuth tokens, and context window settings.

cause: 模型 API 参数 reasoning_effort 值无效
description: Gateway sent an invalid reasoning_effort value (e.g. 'minimal'). Valid values: 'low', 'medium', 'high'. This is a bug in openclaw.

match: Non-fatal unhandled rejection.*TypeError: fetch failed|unhandled rejection.*fetch failed
cause: HTTP fetch 请求失败 (非致命)
description: An outbound HTTP request failed. Gateway marked it as non-fatal and continues. Likely transient network issue.

match: Polling runner stop timed out after \d+s; forcing restart cycle|Polling stall detected.*no getUpdates for \d+
cause: Telegram Polling 完全卡死，需要重启 Gateway
description: Telegram bots stopped polling. Either the polling runner stop timed out (forcing restart cycle), or no getUpdates for ~3+ minutes. Gateway self-recovers; watchdog forces a full restart if the stall recurs.
